creator: johalun@FreeBSD.org
text:
After updating to latest version the Emacs process is stuck at 100% cpu usage.

Version: Emacs 26.2 (build 1, amd64-portbld-freebsd13.0, GTK+ Version 3.24.7)

Steps to reproduce:
1. Let your .emacs contain only (global-auto-revert-mode 1).
2. Start Emacs.
3. Emacs now using 100% cpu.
4. truss -p <pid> show that Emacs is doing fstatat(), possibly stuck endless loop.

I filed a bug upstream but they said this is not an issue on Linux.
